title: sideritis incana var. matris-filiae
intro: Sideritis incana var. matris-filiae is a perennial plant species that belongs to the genus Sideritis, commonly referred to as mountain tea. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis incana var. matris-filiae include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Sideritis incana var. matris-filiae is typically prepared as a tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent.
